chapter_title.ar: باب فِيهِ نُكَتٌ وَ نُتَفٌ مِنَ التَّنْزِيلِ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 108 – Points and pickings from the Revelation regarding the Wilayah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (86/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (86/ 5)
text: هِ تَعَالَى وَ شاهِدٍ وَ مَشْهُودٍ قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Salma Bin Al Khattab, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Abdul Rahman Bin Kaseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of the Exalted [85:3] And the witness and the witnessed. Heasws said: ‘The Prophetsaww and Amir Al-Momineenasws’.
en.sarwar: 69. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ from Ahmad ibn ‘Umar al-Hallal who has said the following. “I asked abu al-Hassan (a.s.) about the words of Allah, the Most High. “. . someone will cry out, “God has condemned the unjust,” [7:44] The Imam (a.s.) said, “The caller will be Amir al-Mu’minin Ali (a.s.).”
